name: fire-and-wind
description: Two procedural environment textures from the new stochastic primitives: `dust` (a Poisson click train) for fire crackle, and a `rand` random-walk modulator for non-periodic wind gusting. Replay with: sonarium replay docs/examples/fire-and-wind.json

steps.note: Fire = two layers: a `dust` crackle (80 sparse grains/sec, each ringing 25 ms, bandpassed to the snap region) over a low brown-noise roar whose lowpass cutoff is driven by a `rand` walk so it breathes instead of sitting still. Looped seamlessly.

Wind = pink noise through a lowpass whose cutoff gusts on a slow `rand` walk, with a second `rand` riding the gain for swelling intensity. The two walks have different seeds so they decorrelate. Non-periodic by construction — no audible loop in the motion itself.
